title: Melon update
description:
Make melons look more realistic
(Eating animation support)
body:
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555556735174b8f955c5fe9bf375a862795bd1a4.png)

A resource pack that improves watermelon texture, making it more realistic.

Resurce pack is compatable with EatingAnimation mod
